Despite travel warnings, he plans a trip to Haiti for treatment, hoping to survive.]]></description><link><![CDATA[https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/us-streamers/streamer-ray-j-hospitalized-and-warned-about-failing-heart-after-years-of-drinking-and-partying/articleshow/127735150.cms]]></link><guid><![CDATA[https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/us-streamers/streamer-ray-j-hospitalized-and-warned-about-failing-heart-after-years-of-drinking-and-partying/articleshow/127735150.cms]]></guid><pubDate>Thu, 29 Jan 2026 02:47:01 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>SUMIT ROY</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="743086" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-127735099,imgsize-743086.cms"/></item><item><title><![CDATA[From NY to TN: Smithsonian museum returns Chola, Vijayanagar bronzes to India — all you need to know]]></title><description><![CDATA[]]></description><link><![CDATA[https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/smithsonian-museum-to-return-3-bronzes-to-india/articleshow/127733435.cms]]></link><guid><![CDATA[https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/smithsonian-museum-to-return-3-bronzes-to-india/articleshow/127733435.cms]]></guid><pubDate>Thu, 29 Jan 2026 02:05:50 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>NEELAM RAAJ</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="20616" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-127733468,imgsize-20616.cms"/></item><item><title><![CDATA[Ajit Pawar plane crash: Baramati lacked IMD services; visibility below ideal landing norms: experts]]></title><description><![CDATA[A recent plane crash, claiming the lives of deputy chief minister Ajit Pawar and four others, has ignited concerns over aviation weather protocols. The incident highlights potential gaps in pre-flight briefings for chartered flights and landing visibility standards, particularly at smaller, non-IMD-jurisdiction airstrips like Baramati.]]></description><link><![CDATA[https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/pune/baramati-lacked-imd-weather-services-visibility-below-ideal-landing-norms-experts/articleshow/127731269.cms]]></link><guid><![CDATA[https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/pune/baramati-lacked-imd-weather-services-visibility-below-ideal-landing-norms-experts/articleshow/127731269.cms]]></guid><pubDate>Thu, 29 Jan 2026 06:04:00 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>NEHA MADAAN</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="163066" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-127745852,imgsize-163066.cms"/></item></channel></rss>

      <description><![CDATA[UltraTech Cement reported a consolidated Q3 FY26 net profit of ₹1,729.4 crore, up 27% YoY, exceeding estimates, after accounting for a one-time exceptional expense of ₹88 crore under the new Labour Code. Revenue rose 23% to ₹21,830 crore, while EBITDA grew 35.2% to ₹3,915 crore, with margins improving to 17.94%.       <title><![CDATA[Davos 2026 | IOC chief dismisses excise hike talk, says no indication yet]]></title>
      <link><![CDATA[https://www.cnbctv18.com/business/companies/wef-davos-2026-no-indication-of-excise-duty-hike-biofuels-green-hydrogen-sustainable-aviation-fuel-future-growth-rupee-venezuelan-oil-19826485.htm]]></link>
      <description><![CDATA[Indian Oil Corporation expects global crude prices to remain near current levels due to adequate supply, despite geopolitical risks, its chairman AS Sahney said at Davos 2026. He noted that a weaker rupee continues to impact profitability, though healthy refining margins are helping offset the pressure. Sahney said Venezuelan crude is unlikely to reach India soon, ruled out any immediate excise duty hike, and confirmed LPG subsidy support till October 2026. He also outlined IOC’s renewable energy plans, including green hydrogen, biofuels and sustainable aviation fuel, while targeting major efficiency gains across refineries.]]></description>
